name: 飞鼠所属团体的团长和恩人
identity: 神秘的组织领导者/恩人
speech_style: 语气上带有不确定感和询问性，擅长以组织者的身份引导话题，并负责宣布重要流程（如联络会开始）。
abilities: 制造夸张特效（如身后爆炸或文字浮现）
appearance_summary: A charismatic leader who loves transforming into heroes, often appearing in a Paladin outfit. He is accompanied by exaggerated visual effects like explosions or floating text.
